_note: Frozen baseline for eval/golden.demo.jsonl: repo self-indexed, pure hybrid (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=off). The demo indexes this repo itself, so the corpus grows as the repo does; Hit@5 is the stable gated headline (held at 0.833), while Hit@1/MRR drift as files are added. Re-freeze deliberately when a metric moves beyond the +/-5pp gate tolerance.
